english: no end in sight / no relief in sight / no land in sight
notes: Idiomatic phrase meaning there is no solution, end, or relief visible for a difficult situation. Literally means 'no land in sight', like a sailor lost at sea.

sentences.german: Nach drei Stunden im Stau war kein Land in Sicht.
sentences.english: After three hours in the traffic jam, there was no end in sight.
